mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE category WHEN 'PROJECT' THEN 3.0 WHEN 'STUDY' THEN 2.0 WHEN 'RUN' THEN 1.5 WHEN 'LIFE' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM done_item WHERE log_date BETWEEN #{weekStart} AND #{weekEnd}) AS quality_score, (SELECT NVL(AVG(energy), 5.0) FROM daily_log WHERE log_date BETWEEN #{weekStart} AND #{weekStart} + 2) AS first_half_avg, (SELECT NVL(AVG(energy), 5.0) FROM daily_log WHERE log_date BETWEEN #{weekStart} + 3 AND #{weekEnd}) AS second_half_avg, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_log WHERE log_date BETWEEN #{weekStart} AND #{weekEnd}) AS log_count FROM DUAL
SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE category WHEN 'LIFE' THEN 5 WHEN 'STUDY' THEN 10 WHEN 'RUN' THEN 15 WHEN 'PROJECT' THEN 20 ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM done_item

/* 오늘 또는 어제부터 시작하여 끊기지 않은 연속 일수 계산 */ WITH RECURSIVE_DATES AS ( SELECT MAX(log_date) as last_date FROM done_item WHERE log_date >= #{today} - 1 ) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT log_date) FROM done_item WHERE log_date > ( SELECT NVL(MAX(d), TO_DATE('1900-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')) FROM ( SELECT #{today} - LEVEL + 1 as d FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 1000 /* 최대 1000일까지만 체크 */ ) dates LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT log_date FROM done_item) items ON dates.d = items.log_date WHERE items.log_date IS NULL AND dates.d <= (SELECT last_date FROM RECURSIVE_DATES) )

/* LEAD 함수를 사용하여 어제와 오늘 고민 강도 차이의 평균 산출 */ SELECT NVL(AVG(diff), 0.0) FROM ( SELECT worry_intensity - LEAD(worry_intensity) OVER (ORDER BY log_date DESC) as diff, log_date, LEAD(log_date) OVER (ORDER BY log_date DESC) as prev_date FROM daily_log WHERE log_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) WHERE log_date = prev_date + 1
